registration_intent.rationale: HEXA-WEAVE registers write-side multi-strand molecular design composition (strand bundle composition, P up to 10^4); HEXA-NANOBOT registers a separate sub-axis of biology covering molecular nano-machines (single nano-machine units that perform mechanical actuation at molecular scale, NOT multi-strand composition). The split is a genus-level bifurcation: WEAVE = composition over many strands; NANOBOT = mechanical actuation per molecular unit. Drexler 1986 productive nanotechnology, Seeman 1982 immobile junctions, and Rothemund 2006 DNA origami define the molecular-machine literature corpus addressed here. Distinct from AlphaFold-class read-side prediction and from IsoDDE drug-design.

n6_invariant_mapping.tau_6_eq_4: 4 motor states per molecular nanobot actuator (idle / forward-stroke / backward-stroke / reset) — mechanical power-stroke quartet matching τ(6)=4
n6_invariant_mapping.sigma_6_eq_12: 12 vertex robot — icosahedral DNA-cage / molecular-machine vertex configuration, 12-vertex truncated octahedron / icosahedron skeleton recurs across DNA-origami nano-machines (Rothemund 2006 + Seeman 1982 immobile junction corollary)
n6_invariant_mapping.J_2_eq_24: 24 symmetry — full icosahedral / octahedral rotation group |O|=24 = |J_2| at the n=6 lattice, governing nano-machine pose-equivalence classes in 3D
n6_invariant_mapping.phi_6_eq_2: 2 binary actuator states — open/closed clamp, bound/unbound, forward/back; the φ(6)=2 dichotomy at the actuator output

domain_distinction_from_hexa_weave.object_scale: single nano-machine (10^0-10^2 atoms per actuator) vs HEXA-WEAVE proteome bundle (10^7-10^9 atoms total)
domain_distinction_from_hexa_weave.primary_quantity: mechanical work output (J per cycle) vs HEXA-WEAVE design composition cost (J per inverse-search bit)
domain_distinction_from_hexa_weave.primary_constraint: Brownian-noise floor (kT thermal at 310K) vs HEXA-WEAVE Landauer × NP-search ceiling
domain_distinction_from_hexa_weave.primary_oracle: molecular-dynamics simulation (Drexler 1986 / Goddard 2003) vs HEXA-WEAVE AlphaFold-class fold oracle
domain_distinction_from_hexa_weave.verdict_grade: APPROACH (theoretical-analytical at registration; no empirical nano-machine MVP yet)

n6_invariant_thread.tau_6_eq_4: 4 power-stroke states (idle / forward / backward / reset); 4 axis-types in any nano-machine spec (mechanical / chemical / electrical / informational)
n6_invariant_thread.sigma_6_eq_12: 12 vertex robot — DNA-origami truncated-icosahedron-class nano-cage; 12-fold modular polyhedral assembly
n6_invariant_thread.J_2_eq_24: |O|=24 octahedral pose-symmetry group; 24-fold compositional equivalence on actuator orientations
n6_invariant_thread.post_hoc_decoration_risk: MEDIUM — invariants map structurally to molecular-machine literature (Drexler power-stroke quartet, Rothemund 12-vertex assemblies) but quantitative validation pending; raw 91 C3 honest tag
